summary: Completed testing of Admin Subscription Management feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified subscription column displays correctly with Active/Inactive badges, dialogs work for both activation and deactivation flows.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning) - accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests are cleaned up via fixture teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin subscription management feature fully tested. Backend API works for 1_day, 1_week, 1_month durations. Frontend shows subscription badges in user table with color-coded Active (green) and Inactive (red) states. N/A shown for admin/teacher roles. Dialog opens for both states with appropriate actions (Activate for inactive, Renew/Deactivate for active).

backend_api_tests.GET /api/admin/users subscription_status: PASS - Returns active/inactive for each user

frontend_tests.Subscription column in users table: PASS - Column header and badges visible
frontend_tests.Active badge display (green): PASS - Shows for users with active subscription
frontend_tests.Inactive badge display (red): PASS - Shows for users without active subscription
frontend_tests.N/A display for admin/teacher: PASS - Shows N/A for non-subscribable roles
frontend_tests.Dialog opens for inactive user: PASS - Shows duration selector and Activate button
frontend_tests.Dialog opens for active user: PASS - Shows Renew and Deactivate buttons
frontend_tests.Activation flow: PASS - Badge changes from Inactive to Active after activation
frontend_tests.Deactivation flow: PASS - Badge changes from Active to Inactive after deactivation
frontend_tests.Toast notifications: PASS - Shows success messages on activation/deactivation

subscription_data_model.granted_by_admin flag: Correctly set to true for admin-granted subscriptions
subscription_data_model.parent_emails array: User email added to subscription's parent_emails
subscription_data_model.end_date calculation: Correct based on duration (1 day, 7 days, 30 days)
